2603.19843.title: Overreliance on AI in Information-seeking from Video Content
2603.19843.paper_summary: The ubiquity of multimedia content is reshaping online information spaces, particularly in social media environments. At the same time, search is being rapidly transformed by generative AI, with large language models (LLMs) routinely deployed as intermediaries between users and multimedia content to retrieve and summarize information. Despite their growing influence, the impact of LLM inaccuracies and potential vulnerabilities on multimedia information-seeking tasks remains largely unexplored. We investigate how generative AI affects accuracy, efficiency, and confidence in information retrieval from videos. We conduct an experiment with around 900 participants on 8,000+ video-based information-seeking tasks, comparing behavior across three conditions: (1) access to videos only, (2) access to videos with LLM-based AI assistance, and (3) access to videos with a deceiving AI assistant designed to provide false answers. We find that AI assistance increases accuracy by 3-7% when participants viewed the relevant video segment, and by 27-35% when they did not. Efficiency increases by 10% for short videos and 25% for longer ones. However, participants tend to over-rely on AI outputs, resulting in accuracy drops of up to 32% when interacting with the deceiving AI. Alarmingly, self-reported confidence in answers remains stable across all three conditions. Our findings expose fundamental safety risks in AI-mediated video information retrieval.
2603.19843.paper_summary_zh: 多媒體內容的普及正在重塑線上資訊空間，特別是在社交媒體環境中。<lb/>同時，搜索正被生成式人工智慧迅速改變，大型語言模型（LLMs）經常作為用戶與多媒體內容之間的中介，來檢索和總結資訊。<lb/>儘管它們的影響力日益增長，但LLM的不準確性和潛在脆弱性對多媒體資訊搜尋任務的影響仍然大多未被探討。<lb/>我們研究生成式人工智慧如何影響從視頻檢索資訊的準確性、效率和信心。<lb/>我們進行了一項實驗，約有900名參與者參與了8,000多個基於視頻的資訊搜尋任務，並比較了三種條件下的行為：（1）僅訪問視頻，（2）訪問帶有LLM基礎的AI協助的視頻，以及（3）訪問帶有設計為提供錯誤答案的欺騙性AI助手的視頻。<lb/>我們發現，當參與者觀看相關視頻片段時，AI協助的準確性提高了3-7%；而當他們未觀看相關視頻時，準確性提高了27-35%。<lb/>對於短視頻，效率提高了10%；對於較長的視頻，效率提高了25%。<lb/>然而，參與者往往過度依賴AI輸出，導致與欺騙性AI互動時準確性下降高達32%。<lb/>令人擔憂的是，自我報告的答案信心在所有三種條件下保持穩定。<lb/>我們的研究結果揭示了AI介導的視頻資訊檢索中的基本安全風險。
2603.19843.author: Anders Giovanni Møller et.al.
2603.19843.authors: Anders Giovanni Møller, Elisa Bassignana, Francesco Pierri, Luca Maria Aiello
